UgxcyXas2_-6VF9_xlJ4AaABAg.text: the flash-over reconstruction gets the physics right — Sella's 2006 UCL test is hard to argue on the chemistry. what stays open is why a crew that survived would leave a structurally sound vessel permanently, rather than reboard once the vapour cleared.
